mapper.select: /* 카테고리 목록 조회 repository.selectCategoryList */ WITH RECURSIVE CAT_TREE AS ( SELECT CATEGORY_ID, CATEGORY_NAME, PARN_CAT_ID, CAT_LVL, SORT_ORD, CAST(LPAD(SORT_ORD, 10, '0') AS CHAR(2000)) AS SORT_PATH, 1 AS DEPTH FROM TB_CONTENT_CAT WHERE PARN_CAT_ID IS NULL OR TRIM(PARN_CAT_ID) = '' UNION ALL SELECT C.CATEGORY_ID, C.CATEGORY_NAME, C.PARN_CAT_ID, C.CAT_LVL, C.SORT_ORD, CONCAT(CT.SORT_PATH, '.', LPAD(C.SORT_ORD, 10, '0')), CT.DEPTH + 1 FROM TB_CONTENT_CAT C INNER JOIN CAT_TREE CT ON C.PARN_CAT_ID = CT.CATEGORY_ID ) SELECT * FROM CAT_TREE ORDER BY SORT_PATH

/* 파일 단건 조회 repository.selectDocFilePoolById */ SELECT DOC_FILE_ID , CATEGORY_ID , SEC_LVL , DOC_DESC , FILE_NAME , FILE_PATH , FILE_SIZE , FILE_TYPE , KEYWORDS , DOC_SRC , CREATE_USER_ID , MODIFY_USER_ID , USE_YN , CREATE_DT , MODIFY_DT FROM TB_DOC_FILE WHERE DOC_FILE_ID = #{docFileId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND USE_YN = 'Y'

/* 구축된 데이터셋 포함 여부 repository.selectBuiltDatasetCountByDocFileId */ SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_DS_DOC DD INNER JOIN TB_DS D ON D.DATASET_ID = DD.DATASET_ID WHERE DD.DOC_FILE_ID = #{docFileId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND D.DATASET_BUILD_STATUS_CD = '005'
mapper.insert: /* 카테고리 저장(등록) repository.saveCategory */ INSERT INTO TB_CONTENT_CAT ( CATEGORY_ID , CATEGORY_NAME , PARN_CAT_ID , CAT_LVL , SORT_ORD , CREATE_DT ) SELECT V.CATEGORY_ID , V.CATEGORY_NAME , V.PARN_CAT_ID , CASE WHEN V.PARN_CAT_ID IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE P.CAT_LVL + 1 END , V.SORT_ORD , NOW() FROM ( SELECT #{categoryId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS CATEGORY_ID , #{categoryName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS CATEGORY_NAME , NULLIF(#{parnCatId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '') AS PARN_CAT_ID , COALESCE(#{sortOrd, jdbcType=INTEGER}, 0) AS SORT_ORD ) V LEFT JOIN TB_CONTENT_CAT P ON P.CATEGORY_ID = V.PARN_CAT_ID WHERE V.PARN_CAT_ID IS NULL OR P.CATEGORY_ID IS NOT NULL
